items.title: JWT secret requirement enforced
items.recommendation: Continue mandatory JWT secret enforcement and rotate secrets per environment.

items.title: Cookie/session security settings are explicitly production-hardened
items.recommendation: Explicitly assert secure + strict cookie policy in auth cookie set paths for production.

items.title: Protected route and admin guard coverage exists
items.recommendation: Maintain route guard coverage for all sensitive endpoints and admin UI routes.

items.title: Rate limit policies are present on sensitive flows
items.recommendation: Expand coverage and ensure all auth/admin write endpoints are protected by throttling.

items.title: Cross-user data isolation indicators present in test/runbook evidence
items.recommendation: Keep automated ownership assertions in smoke tests and add explicit regression gates in CI.

items.title: Checkout session route exists and is authenticated
items.recommendation: Keep authenticated checkout creation and package whitelisting.

items.title: Webhook endpoint and signature verification are implemented
items.recommendation: Do not launch paid flow without verified webhook signatures.

items.title: Credits are granted only on completed payment and guarded for duplicates
items.recommendation: Retain idempotent fulfillment and completed-event-only crediting.

items.title: Admin Stripe session visibility exists
items.recommendation: Ensure admin troubleshooting path remains available in production.

items.title: Test/live mode clarity documented
items.recommendation: Enforce key/source validation in CI to prevent test/live mixups.

items.title: Connector stack defaults to NOT_CONFIGURED for missing endpoints
items.recommendation: Retain fail-safe NOT_CONFIGURED behavior and avoid implicit activation.

items.title: Connector activation endpoints remain admin-protected and explicit
items.recommendation: Keep explicit activation workflow and legal approval gates.

items.title: AI chat is not introduced in current runtime
items.recommendation: Keep AI/chat features out of production scope unless explicitly planned and gated.

items.title: No unsupported automated e-Devlet or scraper/bot tooling in runtime scope
items.recommendation: Maintain manual-only governance for unsupported external sources.
